category_sources: source_facts.description says Kona is an open-source implementation of the K programming language.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kona; the official repository README title uses Kona.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; the README references further information in the official wiki.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/kevinlawler/kona, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an open-source K implementation; the official README describes K as related to APL and LISP.
